title: Tipsy, Reworked!
description: A complete upgrade and overhaul of germlin's previous tipsy mod.
body:
![Tipsy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0552d41b51953395aaf67aa1bf158dc504af76a.png)

Adds All New** Alchoholic and Non-Alchoholic** Bevrages For You And Your Freinds To Enjoy, Includes A Few Extra Items, **Weapons** And Crafting Blocks To Experiment And Use.
_(Warden Free!)_

Drinks Grant Players Effects And Abilities For Advenring, Fighting and Building. 
Adds Familiar And Unfamiliar Items

**Credits: StitchSprites, CreativeArtSpace, yo314159at, _ray_s**
![Reelin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2af243226d29928d823cd2938aaf877df98be60.jpeg)

Enjoy A Cold One, While On The Docks. **All New Kettle And Fermentation Table Featured Above** _^^^_

![Ugly Mug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3094dc3eac3f1b07dc22db6ae5ea85aa58900b39.jpeg)

Germlin's Ugly Mug and Ugly Mug Featured Above ^^^

![Mystical](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75f576ff6549e775978d36881f9d910346a57796.jpeg)

_Interesting... _

Credits: StitchSprites, CreativeArtSpace, yo314159at, _ray_s
